summary: Audit of the billing app. SEC-001 is kept at high pending verification.

findings.title: Webhook secret only optional in env schema
findings.issue: STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET is .optional() so the app boots without it and skips signature verification.
findings.consequence: Forged webhook calls could grant subscriptions.

verification.note: This needs direct code verification. Keeping as high pending verification.

findings.fix: Make the secret required; fail boot if missing.

findings.title: Debug route ships to production
findings.issue: A /api/dev/dump route returns internal state and is not gated by NODE_ENV.
findings.fix: Gate behind an env check or exclude from the production build.
